generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a former counterterrorism analyst with 20 years in the field, I can tell you: the new domestic security measures aren't about 'big brother' - they're about keeping up with evolving threats. The system has safeguards - it's not about mass surveillance, it's about targeted protection when we need it most. #NationalSecurity #SafetyFirst
